name: One Dish Spaghetti (for 2)
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 oz.) Italian seasoned tomato sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the ground beef into a 1-quart microwave-safe casserole dish.
2. Add onion to the casserole dish.
3. Microwave on high for 2 - 2 1/2 minutes or until the ground beef is no longer pink, stirring once.
4. Drain any excess grease and stir to break the meat into smaller pieces.
5. Add tomato sauce, water, and spaghetti to the casserole dish.
6. Cover with the casserole lid.
7. Microwave for 10 - 11 minutes or until the spaghetti is tender, stirring twice.
8. Serve with Parmesan cheese.
